message:
fix: stop hardcoding 'origin' as dolt remote name (GH #gt-1hfkr)

Dolt databases may have remotes named 'github' or other names, not
just 'origin'. The sync and daemon code silently skipped these databases
because it only looked for 'origin'.

- Add FindRemote() that discovers any configured remote (name + URL)
- PushDatabase() now takes a remote name parameter
- Daemon auto-discovers databases with any remote when no specific
  remote is configured in patrol config
- Keep HasRemote() as deprecated wrapper for backward compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
